assertions.title: Settings gear opens sidebar; Close dismisses it

steps.action: Open /demo/dashboard-running and click top-nav Settings gear
steps.expected: Settings sidebar opens with Settings heading and profile sections
steps.observed: Sidebar opened with settings controls (Close settings, relay list, Rotate/Export/Lock/Clear rows).

steps.expected: Sidebar closes and running dashboard panels reappear without sidebar
steps.observed: Sidebar dismissed; running dashboard content shown again on /demo/dashboard-running.

assertions.title: Export Profile flow: sidebar → Export → submit → Backup Ready → Done

steps.action: From open sidebar, click Export row
steps.observed: Export modal opened with Export Password + Confirm Password fields.

steps.action: Enter matching passwords and click Export
steps.observed: Backup Ready modal appeared with Copy/Download and Done actions.

steps.expected: Modal closes and sidebar remains visible
steps.observed: Modal closed but sidebar was also closed; returned to main running dashboard without sidebar.

assertions.issues: Done closes both the export-complete modal and the settings sidebar, contrary to expected sidebar persistence.

assertions.title: Clear Credentials Cancel dismisses modal without data loss

steps.observed: Destructive clear-credentials modal opened with Cancel and Clear Credentials buttons.

steps.expected: Modal closes and sidebar content remains
steps.observed: Modal dismissed; sidebar remained visible with same profile/group rows and actions.

steps.expected: Navigate to / with Welcome screen and no dashboard chrome
steps.observed: Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/ and dashboard runtime/sidebar chrome was no longer present.

steps.expected: Policies view opens with active Policies button
steps.observed: Policies view opened; snapshot reported Policies button as pressed and policy controls visible.

steps.expected: Return to running dashboard view without Signer Policies headings
steps.observed: Returned to running dashboard panels (status, peers, event log, approvals).

steps.action: From dashboard settings, click Rotate Keyset
steps.expected: Navigate to /rotate-keyset with Rotate Keyset screen
steps.observed: Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/rotate-keyset with Rotate Keyset heading visible.

steps.action: From dashboard settings sidebar, click Rotate Share
steps.observed: Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/rotate-share with Enter Rotate Package content visible.
Navigated to http://127.0.0.1:5173/recover/demo-profile with Recover NSEC screen visible.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 7 passed, 1 failed (VAL-DSH-031: clicking Done on Backup Ready closes the settings sidebar instead of leaving it open).
